description: EdgeX Foundry — System Monitoring Dashboard. Visualize CPU, Memory, Network, Disk, Temperature metrics từ thiết bị biên qua Kafka → Spark → Iceberg → Trino pipeline.

targets.rawSql: SELECT avg_value FROM iceberg.edgex.edgex_gold WHERE resource_name = 'CPUUsage' AND device_name = '${device_name}' ORDER BY window_start DESC LIMIT 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT window_start AS time, avg_value AS "CPU Usage %", min_value AS "CPU Min %", max_value AS "CPU Max %" FROM iceberg.edgex.edgex_gold WHERE resource_name = 'CPUUsage' AND device_name = '${device_name}' AND window_start >= now() - interval '${time_range}' minute ORDER BY window_start

targets.rawSql: SELECT window_start, device_name, resource_name, sample_count, ROUND(avg_value, 4) AS avg_value, ROUND(min_value, 4) AS min_value, ROUND(max_value, 4) AS max_value, generated_at FROM iceberg.edgex.edgex_gold WHERE device_name = '${device_name}' AND window_start >= now() - interval '60' minute ORDER BY window_start DESC, resource_name LIMIT 200
targets.query: SELECT window_start, device_name, resource_name, sample_count, ROUND(avg_value, 4) AS avg_value, ROUND(min_value, 4) AS min_value, ROUND(max_value, 4) AS max_value, generated_at FROM iceberg.edgex.edgex_gold WHERE device_name = '${device_name}' AND window_start >= now() - interval '60' minute ORDER BY window_start DESC, resource_name LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT device_name FROM iceberg.edgex.edgex_gold ORDER BY device_name
